settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Import data and manage database backups.

publishers.title: Import publishers
publishers.description: Import publishers from a CSV file using the provided template.
publishers.importButton: Import {count, plural, one {# publisher} other {# publishers}}

dropzone.title: Drag a CSV file here
dropzone.subtitle: or click to browse for a file

publishers.errorDetails: {count, plural, one {# validation error} other {# validation errors}}
publishers.existingDetails: {count, plural, one {# publisher already exists} other {# publishers already exist}} in the database

table.existsInDb: This publisher already exists in the database and will be skipped

history.title: Import assignment history
history.description: Import history records from a CSV file using the provided template.
history.importButton: Import {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}}

dropzone.title: Drag a CSV file here
dropzone.subtitle: or click to browse for a file

history.errorDetails: {count, plural, one {# validation error} other {# validation errors}}
history.duplicateDetails: {count, plural, one {# duplicate record} other {# duplicate records}} in the CSV

weeks.title: Import meeting weeks
weeks.description: Import complete weeks (midweek parts and assignments) from a CSV file.
weeks.importButton: Import {count, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}}

dropzone.title: Drag a CSV file here
dropzone.subtitle: Each row is a meeting part. Rows sharing the same date are grouped into one week.

summary.valid: {count, plural, one {# valid week} other {# valid weeks}}

weeks.errorDetails: {count, plural, one {# validation error} other {# validation errors}}
weeks.existingDetails: {count, plural, one {# week already exists} other {# weeks already exist}} in the database

result.title: Import completed
result.weeksCreated: {count, plural, one {# week created} other {# weeks created}}

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Download or restore the system SQLite database.

download.title: Download Backup
download.description: Download a copy of the current database file.

upload.title: Restore Backup
upload.description: Upload a database file (.db) to replace the current data. THIS ACTION REPLACES ALL DATA.
upload.confirm: Are you sure? This will replace ALL current data.

clear.title: Clear database
clear.description: Delete all data stored in the database.
clear.warning: This action will delete ALL data from the database. This action is IRREVERSIBLE.
clear.confirm: Are you sure? This will delete ALL publishers, weeks, history, and assignments.
